name: Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome (EDS)
description: Genetic/Connective Tissue disorder characterized by joint hypermobility, skin hyperextensibility, and tissue fragility.

name: Myasthenia Gravis (MG)
description: Autoimmune/Neuromuscular disease causing muscle weakness that worsens with exertion.

name: Primary Biliary Cholangitis (PBC)
description: Autoimmune liver disease characterized by destruction of small bile ducts.

name: Guillain-Barré Syndrome (GBS)
description: Autoimmune condition where the immune system attacks the peripheral nerves.

name: Cystic Fibrosis (CF)
description: Genetic multi-system disorder affecting the lungs, pancreas, and other organs.

name: Hereditary Hemochromatosis (HH)
description: Genetic metabolic disorder causing excessive iron accumulation in the body.

name: Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (AATD)
description: Genetic disorder that may cause lung disease and liver disease.

name: Wilson's Disease
description: Genetic metabolic disorder resulting in copper accumulation in the liver, brain, and other organs.

name: Fabry Disease
description: Genetic lysosomal storage disorder leading to the accumulation of globotriaosylceramide.

name: Stiff Person Syndrome (SPS)
description: Rare autoimmune neurological disorder characterized by progressive muscle stiffness and spasms.
